ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., client, nutritionist, admin) */,
  "dietary_preferences" TEXT /* Dietary preferences of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_profiles" (
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user profile */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user whose profile is being tracked */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the user in meters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the user in kilograms */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the user */,
  "activity_level" TEXT /* Activity level of the user (e.g., sedentary, lightly active, very active) */,
  "health_goals" TEXT /* Health goals of the user (e.g., weight loss, muscle gain, maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_profiles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "meals" (
  "meal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each meal item */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the meal item */,
  "quantity" TEXT /* Quantity of the meal item */,
  "calories" REAL /* Calories in the meal item */,
  "carbs" TEXT /* Carbohydrates in the meal item */,
  "fat" TEXT /* Fat in the meal item */,
  "protein" TEXT /* Protein in the meal item */,
  "meal_time" TEXT /* Time of day the meal is typically consumed */,
  "is_liked_by" TEXT /* Users who like the meal item */,
  "is_compound" INTEGER /* Indicates if the meal item is a compound dish */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the meal item (e.g., ALWAYS, NEVER, NORMAL) */,
  "multiple" INTEGER /* Number of components in the meal item */,
  "added_since" TEXT /* Date the meal item was added to the database */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the meal item */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the meal item's image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("meal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "meal_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each meal preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user whose preference is being tracked */,
  "meal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the meal item */,
  "is_liked" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user likes the meal */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the preference was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the preference was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meal_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meal_preferences_meal_id FOREIGN KEY ("meal_id") REFERENCES meals ("meal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "meal_plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each meal plan */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user whose meal plan is being tracked */,
  "meal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the meal item included in the plan */,
  "meal_time" TEXT /* Time of day the meal is planned */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the meal (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the meal plan */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the meal plan */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the meal plan was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the meal plan was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meal_plans_meal_id FOREIGN KEY ("meal_id") REFERENCES meals ("meal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meal_plans_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "meal_compounds" (
  "compound_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compound meal component */,
  "meal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the compound meal */,
  "component_meal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component meal item */,
  "quantity" TEXT /* Quantity of the component meal item in the compound meal */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the compound meal was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the compound meal was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compound_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meal_compounds_meal_id FOREIGN KEY ("meal_id") REFERENCES meals ("meal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meal_compounds_component_meal_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_meal_id") REFERENCES meals ("meal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "meal_nutrition" (
  "nutrition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each meal nutrition entry */,
  "meal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the meal item */,
  "serving_size" TEXT /* Serving size of the meal item */,
  "calories" REAL /* Calories in the meal item */,
  "carbs" TEXT /* Carbohydrates in the meal item */,
  "fat" TEXT /* Fat in the meal item */,
  "protein" TEXT /* Protein in the meal item */,
  "fiber" TEXT /* Fiber in the meal item */,
  "sugar" TEXT /* Sugar in the meal item */,
  "sodium" TEXT /* Sodium in the meal item */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the meal nutrition was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the meal nutrition was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nutrition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meal_nutrition_meal_id FOREIGN KEY ("meal_id") REFERENCES meals ("meal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "meal_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each meal tag */,
  "meal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the meal item */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the meal tag was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the meal tag was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meal_tags_meal_id FOREIGN KEY ("meal_id") REFERENCES meals ("meal_id")
)
